definition:
flowchart LR
    subgraph Main["Main Process"]
        direction TB
        MConfig["Config"]
        MGit["Git"]
        MFile["File System"]
        MAI["AI Engine"]
        MSpells["Spells"]
        MTheme["Theme"]
    end
    subgraph Preload["Preload Bridge"]
        PB["IPC Bridge"]
    end
    subgraph Renderer["Renderer"]
        direction TB
        RT["Tile Manager"]
        VW["16 Views"]
        SH["Shared Components"]
    end

    MConfig --> PB
    MGit --> PB
    MFile --> PB
    MAI --> PB
    MSpells --> PB
    MTheme --> PB
    PB --> RT
    RT --> VW
    RT --> SH
